scripts.build: node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && cp apple-touch-icon.png favicon-16x16.png favicon-32x32.png favicon-48x48.png favicon.svg icon-192.png icon-512.png og-image.avif og-image.png og-image.svg og-image.webp robots.txt sitemap.xml site.webmanifest dist/ && node ./scripts/prepare-seo-assets.mjs
